sourceCode: newTenured: sizeRequested	"Return a new instance with the number of indexable variables specified by the argument."	^ self == String		  ifTrue: [ ByteString new: sizeRequested ]		  ifFalse: [ self basicNewTenured: sizeRequested ]

copyFrom: start to: stop	"Answer a copy of a subset of the receiver, starting from element at	index start until element at index stop."	| newSize |	newSize := stop - start + 1.	^ (self species newTenured: newSize)		  replaceFrom: 1		  to: newSize		  with: self		  startingAt: start

readNextRecord	| record |	record := self _pretenured_258751791_recordClassNew: fieldCount.	fieldAccessors		ifNil: [ self readNextRecordWithoutFieldAccessors: record ]		ifNotNil: [ self readNextRecordWithFieldAccessors: record ].	self handleEndOfRecord.	^ record
